goals.title: Create Station Scout V1 as a private GitHub repo under C:\Users\joshu...
goals.objective: Create Station Scout V1 as a private GitHub repo under C:\Users\joshu\gh-projects. Station Scout is a desktop Radio Browser explorer with player, tray support, notifications, and per-station tune-in timers. Implement a small but working V1, verify locally, and commit meaningful milestones before pushing to a private Orinks/station-scout repository.
goals.evidence: Created private GitHub repo https://github.com/Orinks/station-scout; pushed milestone commits a4b5d4b,d99537a,6cc81c3,cd493c5; local pytest 7 passed; Ruff passed; editable install passed; GitHub CI run 25602903674 passed.
